data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: While the exploratory step aims to validate the tracking of shares, clicks, signups, and completions, the evidence provided does not explicitly confirm that all these elements are being tracked. The linked use case mentions a unique referral link and some tracking of referrals and rewards, but it lacks concrete evidence of tracking shares and clicks specifically. Therefore, there is a gap in the evidence regarding the complete coverage of the requirement.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming tracking of shares and clicks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
